headline: Google I/O 2026 live updates: News on Android, Gemini AI, XR, and more we're expecting

article_items.title: Google I/O 2026 live updates: News on Android, Gemini AI, XR, and more we're expecting
article_items.description: We're reporting live from Mountain View at Google's annual developer conference. Stay tuned for the latest updates.

article_items.title: Introducing LangChain Labs
article_items.description: LangChain Labs is a new applied research effort focused on continual learning for agents, with partners advancing open research on self-improving AI systems.
article_items.excerpt: LangChain Labs is a new applied research effort focused on continual learning for agents, with partners advancing open research on self-improving AI systems.

article_items.title: Everything we shipped at Interrupt
article_items.description: From autonomous debugging to one-line deploys, here's every product LangChain launched at Interrupt 2026 to help teams build, test, and ship agents in production.
article_items.excerpt: From autonomous debugging to one-line deploys, here's every product LangChain launched at Interrupt 2026 to help teams build, test, and ship agents in production.

article_items.title: Delta Channels: How We’re Evolving our Runtime for Long-Running Agents
article_items.description: Long-running agents have a storage problem: checkpointing full state at every step grows at O(N²). DeltaChannel is a new primitive in LangGraph 1.2 that checkpoints only the diff each step and writes full snapshots periodically, keeping storage costs flat as sessions grow longer. It ships by default in Deep Agents v0.6, with no config changes or data migration required.
article_items.excerpt: Long-running agents have a storage problem: checkpointing full state at every step grows at O(N²). DeltaChannel is a new primitive in LangGraph 1.2 that checkpoints only the diff each step and writes full snapshots periodically, keeping storage costs flat as sessions grow longer. It ships by default in Deep Agents v0.6, with no config changes or data migration required.

article_items.title: New in Deep Agents v0.6
article_items.description: Deep Agents 0.6 ships a code interpreter, harness profiles, streaming v3, delta channels, and ContextHub, making agents faster, cheaper, and more scalable.
article_items.excerpt: Deep Agents 0.6 ships a code interpreter, harness profiles, streaming v3, delta channels, and ContextHub, making agents faster, cheaper, and more scalable.
